ABOUT_ME.TITLE: About me
ABOUT_ME.TEXT: Senior Software Engineer and AI Integrator with extensive expertise in full-stack web applications, native desktop tools (Tauri), and banking microservice architectures. Proven track record in designing high-availability systems, active-active database replication, and scalable backend services with Java Spring Boot, .NET, and Angular. Committed to clean architecture, automated deployment pipelines, and technical leadership to deliver high-impact enterprise solutions.

bytesw.title: Lead Software Engineer & Technical Leader — BYTESW
bytesw.description: Led the design, development, and orchestration of high-availability microservices for critical transaction management in the corporate banking sector. Coordinated sprints, managed deployments to AWS EKS, and established code quality, testing, and security standards.

gelatopos.title: Full-Stack Engineer — GelatoPOS
gelatopos.description: Designed and deployed a transactional POS and real-time inventory system for retail stores. Automated menu-item-to-container stock deduction algorithms and built interactive sales analytics dashboards.

applaundry.title: Full-Stack Software Architect — AppLaundry / Lavanderia Rosita
applaundry.description: Architected a hybrid local-cloud infrastructure featuring active-active database replication between cloud VPS and local Synology NAS with automatic failover. Built receipt printing modules and clothing state workflows.

kipuview.title: KipuView
kipuview.subtitle: Cross-Platform Delimited Text Parser & Grid Editor
kipuview.description: A high-performance delimited text editor built with Tauri v2 and Angular 22, enabling native cross-platform grid operations on large files.
kipuview.longDescription: KipuView is a premium, lightweight text parser, table visualizer, and grid editor running natively on macOS, Windows, and Linux, as well as compiling directly to standard web browsers. It provides lightning-fast tabular rendering for massive files, ensuring real-time inline editing and query navigation.
kipuview.feature_0: Multi-Tab Workspace: Sandboxed tabs that independently preserve delimiters, file paths, and modification states.
kipuview.feature_1: High-Performance Parser: Line-by-line index scanning loops that parse cell payloads without blocking the main UI thread.
kipuview.feature_2: Interactive Grid: Direct cell correction, modification highlighting, and safe Tauri-based disk writes.
kipuview.feature_3: Advanced Find & Replace: Case-sensitivity, whole-word matching, regular expressions, and column scope filters.
kipuview.engineering: Built with unidirectional data flow using Angular Signals for reactive UI state updates. Integrates Tauri system plugins (@tauri-apps/plugin-fs, @tauri-apps/plugin-dialog, and @tauri-apps/plugin-updater) for native file system access and auto-updates, with standard browser fallback controls.

gelatopos.title: GelatoPOS
gelatopos.subtitle: Ice Cream Shop Management & POS System
gelatopos.description: A full-stack sales, smart inventory, and financial audit POS system tailored for ice cream shops, built with Flask and Angular 20.
gelatopos.longDescription: GelatoPOS is an enterprise-ready sales order and inventory management solution. It automates counter sales and solves a critical tracking problem by linking menu items with physical containers (cones and cups), dynamically reducing inventory in real time.
gelatopos.feature_0: POS Order Desk: Responsive, rapid checkout interface with flexible payment options (cash, cards, local e-wallets).
gelatopos.feature_1: Smart Inventory Depletion: Real-time container count reductions mapped to products upon checkout.
gelatopos.feature_2: Cash Tonnage Calculator: Shift close drawer reconciliation desglosing currency denominations to flag surpluses or deficits.
gelatopos.feature_3: Analytics & Reports: Apache ECharts dashboards and jsPDF + html2canvas PDF exports for daily sales registers.
gelatopos.engineering: Uses Flask (Python 3) and SQLAlchemy 2.x backend running PyMySQL. Timezone calculations are synchronized to America/Lima via Day.js to prevent shift-crossover date errors. Fully containerized with multi-stage Docker builds served by Nginx and Gunicorn.

applaundry.title: AppLaundry
applaundry.subtitle: Laundry Management & Automation System
applaundry.description: A robust hybrid VPS/NAS full-stack business system with active-active replica database failover, built with .NET 9 and Angular 20.
applaundry.longDescription: AppLaundry is a full-stack administrative suite designed to digitize and manage the operational lifecycle of a laundry business chain. It features a robust transactional backend paired with complex local infrastructure highlights.
applaundry.feature_0: Garment Tracking: Quick registration, service breakdowns, and multi-state operational progress workflows.
applaundry.feature_1: Ticket Printing: Native local integration with industrial thermal receipt printers via DLL interfaces.
applaundry.feature_2: Database Replication: Bidirectional Active-Active Master-Master MariaDB replication between cloud VPS and Synology NAS.
applaundry.feature_3: Connection Failover: Auto-health monitoring in .NET that switches connection pools to NAS in under 5 seconds if VPS is down.
applaundry.engineering: Secured using Cloudflare Zero Trust Tunnels to safely expose NAS Docker containers without router port-forwarding. Frontend is compiled and optimized using Bun for high-performance builds. Employs ClosedXML in .NET for rich Excel report compilation.

bytesw.title: BYTESW
bytesw.subtitle: Banking Services & Microservices Infrastructure
bytesw.description: Critical financial microservices infrastructure managing core banking transactions, built with Spring Boot, Micronaut, and Angular.
bytesw.longDescription: BYTESW is a secure, high-availability banking portal executing critical financial transactions. Structured around a microservices pattern, the platform processes heavy payloads, guarantees secure authentication, and serves high concurrency requirements.
bytesw.feature_0: Microservices Core: Robust backend services built with Java Spring Boot and Micronaut.
bytesw.feature_1: IAM Security: Centralized authorization and access token guards powered by Keycloak.
bytesw.feature_2: Deployment Pipeline: CI/CD automation through Jenkins pipelines to AWS EKS clusters.
bytesw.feature_3: Team Leadership: Coordinated multiple sprints and enforced code quality, unit testing, and delivery timelines.
bytesw.engineering: Leverages AWS infrastructure (EC2, EKS, RDS) containerized with Docker and orchestrated with Kubernetes. Handles massive data queries with optimized MySQL/MariaDB indexing and caching layers.
